explanation: This interpretation outlines a clear context (PCV Mode and expiratory phase) under which, upon a specific trigger, a breathing cycle is initiated. The requirement specifies that while bool_exp1, when upon bool_exp2, then immediately satisfy inspiratoryPhaseStart.
decision1_substring: PCV Mode: Within the trigger window during the expiratory phase, in the case of spontaneous breathing,
decision2_substring: when it detects a sudden drop in pressure above the inhale trigger sensitivity (i.e., it yields the condition drop(PAW) > ITS_PCV ))
decision3_substring: the ventilator shall trigger a new breathing cycle (i.e., it goes in inspiration phase)
output_structured_natural_language: while PCVMode & expiratoryPhase, upon dropPAW_greaterThan_ITS_PCV, immediately satisfy inspiratoryPhaseStart
